mandate: Symmetric-rigor test of whether any score should RISE. Credit only realized own-conduct improvement; screen for attribution, anti-double-count, window/durability. Upgrade requires >=5pt delta AND realization/durability screen.
note_on_baselines: Several deep-scan 'current composite' values were stale and were corrected against site/src/data/indexes before delta math: Venezuela 4.4->18.0, Sweden 97.2->81.3, Canada 79.6->84.6, Colombia 33.9->35.9, Anthropic 60.0->59.1. UK 65.5, South Korea 62.5, Ukraine 50.0, Syria 0.0 confirmed as published.

results.name: Venezuela
results.key_finding: The June 9 release of 54 prisoners is part of a wave (621<659) already credited in the 2026-04-19 regime-change-reset to 18.0 and re-confirmed at 18.4 just five days ago. No un-priced gain.

results.name: Anthropic
results.key_finding: Advanced AI Framework is realized as a publication but its substance is a regulatory proposal + $350M pledge; assessed net-neutral June 11 and confirmed today. Boundary watch at 0.9pt below Established.

results.name: South Korea
results.key_finding: Martial-law safeguard amendments were enacted July 2025, out-of-window and already in the post-restoration 62.5 baseline; within-window evidence is only administrative aide appointments (June 21).

results.name: United Kingdom
results.key_finding: Employment Rights Act 2025 is out-of-window and phasing in; the most recent full UK baseline (2026-04-30) found 60.6 — below published 65.5 — due to the April 2026 disability-benefit cut. No upward case. Watch as provisions commence.

results.name: Canada
results.key_finding: Indigenous health/water billions are announced not disbursed; first Indigenous Minister and National Council predate the window. June 21 was a statement only. Watch for actual disbursement to re-test EQU (3.5).

results.name: Ukraine
results.key_finding: The 205-for-205 POW swap (May 15) is realized but small, US-brokered, and already priced in the 2026-05-15 confirmation at 50.0; the tied ceasefire collapsed.

results.name: Colombia
screens_fired: countervailing (ELN talks collapsed, other groups expanding)
results.key_finding: Comuneros del Sur disarmament is realized but symbolic; confirmed at 35.9 eleven days ago with no in-window escalation; estimate +1 to +2, sub-threshold.

results.name: Sweden
results.key_finding: Gender Pay Transparency law in force June 7 is realized but a single-subdimension nudge at exemplary level and an EU-directive minimum; not a 5-point mover.

results.name: Syria
screens_fired: stale-baseline screen FIRES (floor set post-Assad on current govt conduct)
directionality (surfaced positive, dominant evidence is ongoing atrocity)
results.key_finding: The 0.0 floor was confirmed 2026-06-05 on the transitional government's OWN conduct (Sweida ~1,000 killed incl. 539 Druze civilians; extrajudicial executions; torture deaths; documented impunity into 2026). Refugee returns and a justice commission are real but do not offset active atrocity. Calibration questions belong at coordinator-level flag-for-review, not a one-off upgrade.

honest_overall: Zero upward proposals. Every candidate failed at least one symmetric-rigor screen: Venezuela/Anthropic/Ukraine/Colombia are already-priced (anti-double-count, several assessed within the last 5-11 days); South Korea and the UK rest on out-of-window structural reforms already in their baselines (UK also has countervailing welfare-cut evidence); Sweden and Canada are realized-but-marginal or announced-not-disbursed at exemplary level; Syria's floor is grounded in the current government's own ongoing mass-atrocity conduct, so the 'stale Assad baseline' upgrade rationale is invalid and the §3e-bis directionality/stale-baseline screens fire. The honest answer for this 30-day window: no score increase is warranted yet for any of the nine. The strongest genuine within-window realized gains (Venezuela prisoners, Ukraine POWs, Sweden pay law) are real but already counted or too small to clear the 5-point bar.

flag_for_review.note: Not a one-off proposal. If there is a coordinator-level calibration question about how floor (0.0) entities undergoing active political transitions should be treated relative to active-perpetration states, raise it as a band-wide flag-for-review — do not relitigate via single-entity upgrade.
